results.rendered_html:
āhva a. [ā-hve-ḍa]
1 Who or what calls, a crier.
2 Named, called.
— hvā [ā-hve-aṅ]
1 Calling, calling out.
2 A name, appellation,
(pb) oft. at the end of comp.; amṛtāhvaḥ, śatāhvā &c.
